steps.title: Find the third angle
steps.content:
In triangle $ABC$, angle $B$ is a right angle and angle $A$ is $64^\circ$.
$$64^\circ+90^\circ+C=180^\circ$$
$$C=26^\circ$$

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: The triangles are congruent, with $A$ corresponding to $D$ and right angle $B$ corresponding to right angle $E$. Therefore, $C$ corresponds to $F$, so angle $F$ has the same measure. The answer is 26.
